titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 126: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 126. (A.R. No. 320 of 1906.) TIRUMĀLPURAM, WALAJAPET TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, central shrine, Ruined Vishṇu temple.

Damaged in several places. Records an endowment of land 1462(1/2) kuḻi of land in extent after purchase by Kōyil Kaṇṇapirāṭṭiyār, wife of Śāttan Kālaṉ Vē[ḷā]ṉ [Ādi]tyaṉ alias Mīnavaṉ Mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Pullāli for meeting the daily expenses on the food offerings at the ardhayāmam (midnight) service in the temple of the Gōvindapāḍi Niṉṟaruḷiṉa-perumāṉaḍigaḷ. The land concerned is stated to have been purchased out of the shares owned by Vishṇuchandra pūdi kramavittan, one of the āḷuṅgaṇattārs of Nallimaṅgalam in Mēlpa[ḷuvū]r-nāḍu in Maṇaiyil-kōṭṭam, his brother Śiṟuvaḍi kramavittan and Ammādi Naṅgaichchāni, wife of Madisūda-kramavittan, another brother. Vishṇuchandra kramavittan was acting on behalf of his sister-in-law Ammadi Naṅgaichchāni. The said land is stated to have been situated to the west of Śiṟṟiyāṟṟūr Rājakēsari-vadi which was being held as dēvadāna-brahmadēyam by the sabhā of Nallimaṅgalam.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 318.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pparakesarivarmmaṟki yāṇṭu 10 3Āvatu lappāṭi pullālic cāttāṉ kālaṉ ve
Ātityaṉāṉa minavanmuventaveḷān maṇavāṭṭiy koyil kaṇṇapirāṭṭiy govindapāṭiy
mānaṭikaḷukku Arddhadhāman=tiruvamutu ceyvataṟkup paḻavarici nāṉāḻiyum neyyamutu
tu nāḻiyuṅ kaṟiyamutiraṇṭum Aṭaikkāyamutañcum veṟṟilaiyamutāraṭukkumāka vippaṭi
śandrāditya Amu ṟku vaiytta nilamāvatu maṇaiyiṟk koṭṭattu melpa r nāṭṭu nallimaṅka
lam yāḷu[ mga] ṇattāru kā viṣṇucandrapūtikramavittaṉum Ivaṉ tampiy ciṟuvaṭikramavittanumivan tampiy matikkutakramavittan braāhmaṇi
Ammāti naṅkaiccānikku Ivaḷ maittunan Ivviṣṇucandra pūtikramavittaṉ mutukaṇṇākavumi nakku viṟṟut tanta nilam Innallimaṅ
kalam yāḷum sabhaiyār devadā deyamākap peṟṟuṭaiya ciṟṟiyāṟṟūr rājakesarivatikku meṟku śrīgarbhavāykkālukku vaṭakku kiḻakku niṉ
ṟum nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟukkut niṉṟum muṉṟāñ catukkattum nālāñcatukkattumāka Āyirattu nāṉūṟṟu Aṟupattiraṇṭaraik kuḻiyum nān
vilai ke 4 10 śrīgovindapāṭi niṉṟaruḷina perumānaṭikaḷukkuk kuṭutteṉ koyil kaṇṇapirāṭṭiyen Itu śrīvaiṣṇavari rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 126 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
